zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet Delamare於1550年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德時，她的父親William Delamare20歲，母親Alice Ferch Thomas Llyd20歲。她於1567年與Thomas Franklen在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年在她的家鄉享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Delamare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, French, Huguenot:  See  De la Mare  .

variants.name: De la Mare
meanings: Norman, French, Huguenot: locative name for someone from (French de ‘of, from’) any of the numerous places in France named La Mare (‘the pool’). Introduced by the Normans, the name was later augmented by Huguenot bearers fleeing religious persecution in France and the Low Countries in the 16th century. Compare Dallimore .

variants.name: Dallimore
meanings: Norman, English: (i) locative name denoting someone from (Old French de) any of the numerous places in France named La Mare (‘the pool’). Compare De la Mare and Delamare . (ii) locative name from Middle English mere ‘lake, pond’ or mor(e) ‘marsh, bog; moor’ (from Old English mere and mōr respectively), with common confusion of these words. Compare Moore .

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet Delamare was born in 1550, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, William Delamare, was 20 and her mother, Alice Ferch Thomas Llyd, was 20. She married Thomas Franklen in 1567, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1580, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

Elle a épousé Thomas Franklen en 1567, à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1580, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet Delamare родилась в 1550 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Delamare было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ferch Thomas Llyd, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Franklen в 1567 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1580 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.
